abilities.name: 깨어진갑옷
abilities.description: 물리 기술을 받으면 방어가 떨어지고 스피드가 올라간다.

flavorTexts.text: Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal.
This Pokémon clads itself in armor that has been fortified by psychic and fire energy, and it shoots blazing fireballs.
